D-MC-REPRO-1.title: phaseA_series.log non-matching SHA-256 due to elapsed-time decoration
D-MC-REPRO-1.description: 7 of 8 output files reproduce with identical SHA-256. phaseA_series.log shows different SHA-256 because the script writes 'elapsed=Xs' decoration lines that depend on host-load timing. All numerical content (a_k magnitudes at every checkpoint, a_1/a_2/a_5/a_5000 explicit values) matches verbatim between the two runs. Compare-Object diff confirms only timing-decoration rows differ.
D-MC-REPRO-1.resolution: Accepted as cosmetic-only divergence. The mathematically-significant numerical content reproduces. Determinism claim H4-A8 specifically referenced Qn_5000_dps250.csv hash, which matches bit-for-bit.
